name: alienmark
description: AlienMark markdown parser and HTML renderer.

scripts.check: pnpm run lint:check && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run style:check && pnpm run test
scripts.style:check: prettier --check package.json README.md src test tsconfig.json --ignore-path ../../.prettierignore
scripts.style:fix: prettier --write package.json README.md src test tsconfig.json --ignore-path ../../.prettierignore
